channel.title: Projects on Qianqian Shan
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Qianqian Shan

item.title: Auto-complete based on N-Gram Model in Hadoop
item.description: Implementation of Auto-Complete with MapReduce Overview Visualization Preliminaries N-Gram Model Discussion Run Auto-Complete in Hadoop References Overview Visualization The following pictures show screenshots of the visulization of autocomplte. Visualization can be done using the files in autocomplete-visualization.tar: cd /data/www/default in your local machine. wget --no-check-certificate https://github.com/QianqianShan/Auto_Complete/blob/master/autocomplete-visualization.tar, download the visualization files. tar -xvf autocomplete-visualization.tar, unzip the file, and there will be a folder autocomplete.

item.title: Circuit Fault Diagnosis Using Simulation and Bayesian Inference
RSpice: A Package for Using Ngspice from R
Seasonal Warranty Prediction Based on Recurrent Event Data
